articles.title: Rupee tops Asia’s worst performers list with 9.9% slide in FY26
articles.description: The Indian rupee ended FY26 as Asia's weakest currency against the US dollar. The Japanese yen also saw a decline. The Malaysian ringgit emerged as the top performer.

topStories.title: Trump cares deeply about U.S.-India relationship: Envoy Sergio Gor
American journalist kidnapped in Baghdad
topStories.description: American freelance journalist Shelly Kittleson has been kidnapped in broad daylight in Baghdad.

topStories.title: Judge halts Trump ballroom project; Trump says work can go on
topStories.description: Donald Trump seemed to suggest work on the $400 million White House ballroom could continue despite a judge’s order.

topStories.title: Suspended From AIUDF, Aminul Islam Joins Congress Days Ahead Of Assam Polls
topStories.description: Elections for all 126 Assembly constituencies in Assam will be held in a single phase on April 9, while counting of votes is scheduled for May 4

topStories.title: Google Allows Users To Change Gmail Usernames Without Losing Mails
topStories.description: Gmail account name change: At present, the option is now fully available to all Google Account holders in the United States.

topStories.title: Trump cares deeply about US-India relationship, says US Ambassador - Business Standard
topStories.description: Trump cares deeply about US-India relationship, says US Ambassador  Business Standard

topStories.title: Tiger Woods says he's seeking treatment to ‘prioritise well-being’; steps away from golf after Florida DUI crash
topStories.description: Tiger Woods has not played an official event since the 2024 British Open. He was recovering from a seventh back surgery in October and was trying to return at the Masters.

topStories.title: Third US Aircraft Carrier Heads To Mideast As Iran War Continues
topStories.description: The vessel was dispatched to the Middle East after the USS Gerald R. Ford - the most expensive American warship ever built, at $13.2 billion - had to leave combat operations as a result of a fire...

topStories.title: Trump plans rare appearance at SC hearing on Birthright Citizenship: ‘Has to do with babies of slaves, not Chinese…’
topStories.description: Donald Trump plans to attend a Supreme Court hearing on birthright citizenship, marking a historic move. Case challenges his executive order limiting citizenship rights.

topStories.title: 5 key changes in US Social Security rules that could hit your wallet in 2026
topStories.description: Retirees should monitor changes in Social Security and tax laws affecting their benefits. In 2026, a 2.8% COLA increase will raise monthly payments, while Medicare premiums rise 9.7%. Additionally, a new tax deduction for seniors may help offset state taxes on Social Security benefits.

topStories.title: Oil Price Today (April 1): Oil jumps 2% despite Iran-US war de-escalation hopes. What lies ahead after 64% March rally
topStories.description: Oil prices are up sharply as the new financial year begins. Supply issues and damage from the Iran-US war are pushing prices higher. However, leaders from both countries have expressed optimism about ending the conflict soon. This could impact future oil prices, though some analysts expect them to remain elevated.

topStories.title: West Asia conflict: Congress spreading panic for political gains like 'political vultures', says PM Modi
topStories.description: Mr. Modi accused Congress of indulging in rumour-mongering and trying to instigate people to queue up at fuel pumps and spread public disorder

dailyNews.title: Al-Sharaa says Syria to stay out of war on Iran unless attacked
dailyNews.description: '14 years of war is enough for Syria': Ahmed al-Sharaa says Syria will remain outside the US-Israeli war on Iran.

dailyNews.title: Trump ‘deeply cares’ about relationship between US and India: Envoy Sergio Gor tweets
dailyNews.description: US President Donald Trump cares deeply about the US-India relationship, US Ambassador to India Sergio Gor said on Tuesday after meeting Trump at the White House.

dailyNews.title: ‘Regional imbalance’ bothers Congress as government plans delimitation to roll out women’s reservation
dailyNews.description: Congress leaders say if the strength of the Lok Sabha and State Assemblies is increased uniformly by 50%, States with larger populations would gain more seats, widening the existing representation gap

dailyNews.title: Judge temporarily halts Trump’s $400m White House ballroom project
dailyNews.description: District Judge Richard Leon says construction has to stop until Congress provides statutory authorisation.

dailyNews.title: Iran US War News LIVE Updates: Trump tells allies ‘go get your own oil’, securing Strait of Hormuz is ‘not for us’
dailyNews.description: Iran US War LIVE: Trump's comments highlighted the changing, and sometimes inconsistent, signals from Washington about how the war, now in its fifth week, could come to an end. Stay tuned for all the latest updates on US-Iran war LIVE Updates.

dailyNews.title: Trump tells allies ‘get your own oil’, says Iran war could end in 2-3 weeks
dailyNews.description: Under pressure as domestic petrol prices soar, US president says no deal needed to end war on Iran.

dailyNews.title: 'Moonshots' and merch - what it's like to be on Florida's Space Coast ahead of Artemis launch
dailyNews.description: Huge crowds are gathering around the Kennedy Space Centre to see the launch of the historic moon mission.

dailyNews.title: Iran war live: Trump says deal ‘irrelevant’; steel plants in Isfahan hit
dailyNews.description: US-Israeli strikes continue across Iran, hitting pharmaceutical companies and steel plants in Isfahan and Farokhshar.

dailyNews.title: Judge temporarily halts construction of Trump's White House ballroom
dailyNews.description: The Republican-appointed judge ruled that Trump was a "steward" of the White House, not the owner.

dailyNews.title: Donald Trump says US could end the Iran war in two to three weeks: 'Deal not a prerequisite'
dailyNews.description: Donald Trump also clarified that a deal was not a prerequisite for the US to end ‘Operation Epic Fury’ – the term used for its military strikes on Iran that began over a month ago.

dailyNews.title: Trump says US will be leaving Iran in two to three weeks
dailyNews.description: Speaking to reporters in the Oval Office, US President Donald Trump says US could leave Iran “in two or three weeks."

dailyNews.title: 'A million things could go wrong' - why seizing Iran's uranium would be so risky for the US
dailyNews.description: Seizing the stockpile would be one of the "most complicated special operations in history," a former defence official tells the BBC.

dailyNews.title: Pope Leo urges Trump to end war on Iran
dailyNews.description: Pope Leo XIV has urged US President Donald Trump to find an “off-ramp” from the US and Israel’s war on Iran.

dailyNews.title: Trump signs executive order overhauling mail-in voting in major election integrity push
dailyNews.description: Trump signed an executive order targeting mail-in voting and voter eligibility, directing agencies to compile citizenship lists and add USPS tracking.

dailyNews.title: Trump says he will attend Supreme Court oral arguments on birthright citizenship challenge
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump says he may attend Supreme Court arguments on his birthright citizenship order, which he claims was never meant to cover children of illegal immigrants.

dailyNews.title: Trump addresses birthright citizenship, mail-in ballots during executive order signing
dailyNews.description: President Trump signed an executive order saying the U.S. Postal Service could only send out mail-in ballots to people that have been approved as official voters by the federal government. Trump also went on to address birthright citizenship and his plans to attend the Supreme Court hearing.

dailyNews.title: Trump plans to attend oral arguments in Supreme Court birthright citizenship case
dailyNews.description: Both the Supreme Court and the Supreme Court Historical Society have said there is no official record of any sitting president attending oral arguments.

dailyNews.title: Federal judge temporarily blocks construction of Trump's White House ballroom
dailyNews.description: The judge in Washington issued an order halting the construction of Trump's expansive new White House ballroom and any further demolition of the East Wing.

dailyNews.title: Judge orders UPenn to provide list of Jewish employees sought by Trump administration
dailyNews.description: A federal judge ruled Tuesday that the University of Pennsylvania must comply with a Trump administration subpoena seeking information related to Jewish employees at the Ivy League school.

dailyNews.title: Judge blocks Trump's termination of parole for migrants who legally entered U.S. using Biden-era app
dailyNews.description: More than 900,000 people legally entered the U.S. through the CBP One application that scheduled appointments for migrants at ports of entry beginning in January 2023.

dailyNews.title: As Americans bear costs of Iran war and DHS shutdown, D.C. politicians leave town
dailyNews.description: Congress left for recess without resolving the shutdown, and Trump still regularly goes to Palm Beach and says he won't give up golfing during wartime.

dailyNews.title: Trump to attend Supreme Court hearing on citizenship
dailyNews.description: Trump to attend Supreme Court hearing on citizenship

dailyNews.title: Trump Signs Order Seeking Federal Control of Mail Voting as He Promotes False Claims
dailyNews.description: Election experts and Democratic officials called the order legally invalid, and Arizona and Oregon pledged to immediately challenge it in court.

dailyNews.title: Justice Dept. Struggles to Respond to Trump’s Suit Against IRS
dailyNews.description: Officials at the department and the White House are in the middle of a messy and complicated debate over how to respond to President Trump’s lawsuit demanding $10 billion from the I.R.S.
